# Research - 2026-07-02

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> 1-day delta. Thursday -> monthly repos (aider, claude-code) skipped.
> Prior #1 (Anthropic adaptive `reasoning_effort`) LANDED
> (`model-match.ts:112-129`). Prior #2 (`--yolo`) and prior AbortSignal
> still OPEN. Prior #3 partially landed: `stripInternalOptions` exists
> at `agent/index.ts:50` but has ZERO call sites. Three items today:
> finish the sanitizer wire-up, a NEW compaction budget floor from
> cline #12022, and re-surface the AbortSignal gap.

## Executive Summary

- **#1 (~1h)**: `stripInternalOptions` (`agent/index.ts:50`) has zero
  call sites. Wire into `agenticChat.ts` + `streamingOrchestrator.ts`.
- **#2 (~2h)**: floor the compaction trigger at `maxContextTokens *
  0.5` in `compaction.ts:393` so a future model with
  `maxOutputTokens ~ contextWindow` (MiniMax M3 pattern) does not
  collapse `triggerTokens` toward 0. Preventive.
- **#3 (~2h)**: still open - plumb `signal?: AbortSignal` through
  `sendChat` (`orchestrator.ts:78`). Streaming forwards `signal` at
  `streamingOrchestrator.ts:150`; the non-streaming path is the last
  leak.
- **Rotation**: aider + claude-code monthly demotion LANDED in
  `agent1-research-system.md:22-23`. No new demotions.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Wire `stripInternalOptions` into provider dispatch (provider, ~1h)

- **What**: `stripInternalOptions` (`agent/index.ts:50-57`) strips the
  `INTERNAL_OPTION_KEYS` deny-list (`id`, `displayName`, `source`,
  `reference`, `resolved`) from `agent.options`. Currently a no-op
  guard - the only `grep -rn` hit is the definition itself. Call it
  in `src/core/agenticChat.ts` and `src/core/streamingOrchestrator.ts`
  before `agent.options` reaches `provider.complete()`. Tests: fixture
  agent with all five deny-list keys plus one custom key produces an
  options bag at the provider seam containing only the custom key.
- **Why**: The function was designed to prevent NVIDIA NIM / MiniMax
  M3-style strict-schema 400s (kilocode `275af49`). Guarding without
  calling ships a false sense of safety. Landing the wire-up now
  costs 1h; discovering it after the first strict-provider failure
  is an afternoon of grepping tool timeouts.
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode#11767 (`ac987f5`, 2026-06-30, deny-
  list origin) + `275af49` (2026-06-29, added `reference`/`resolved`).
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: small (~1h).

#### 2. Floor compaction trigger at half context window (config, ~2h)

- **What**: In `src/core/compaction.ts:393`, replace `triggerTokens =
  Math.max(0, maxContextTokens - reserveOutputTokens)` with a helper
  `deriveTriggerTokens(ctx, reserve) = Math.max(Math.floor(ctx * 0.5),
  ctx - reserve)`. Same guard for `shouldCompact` (`compaction.ts:165`).
  Tests: 200k ctx + 4096 reserve -> ~195k (unchanged); 200k ctx +
  199k reserve (MiniMax M3) -> 100k, not 1k; 8k ctx + 4096 reserve ->
  4096 (existing gpt-3.5, unchanged).
- **Why**: Cline hit this collapse on OpenRouter MiniMax M3 where
  `maxTokens ~= maxInputTokens` produced a near-zero target and
  tripped their last-resort first-user-truncation path. Our
  algorithm summarizes rather than prefix-truncates, so failure is
  milder (whole transcript summarized every turn), but the root cause
  is identical. No model in `catalog.ts` trips it today (all
  `maxOutputTokens: 4096` against 8k-200k context) - a future entry
  easily could.
- **Source**: cline/cline#12022 (`be97d95`, 2026-07-01, `+273 -42`,
  `sdk/packages/core/src/extensions/context/compaction.ts`).
- **Category**: config. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 3. Thread `AbortSignal` through non-streaming `sendChat` (provider, ~2h)

- **What**: `orchestrator.ts:78` calls `provider.complete(messages,
  { maxTokens: 4096 })` with no `signal`. Add `signal?: AbortSignal`
  to `sendChat` options (`orchestrator.ts:8-14`) and forward it.
  `sapOrchestration.ts:320` already accepts `signal`. Propagate up
  through `interactive.ts` Ctrl+C via `AbortController`, mirroring
  streaming. Tests: abort mid-request throws `AbortError` promptly;
  route bookkeeping is NOT recorded as `permanent` (aborted != failed).
- **Why**: Prior brief flagged this and it is still open. Streaming
  honors Ctrl+C today; the non-streaming path silently keeps burning
  tokens after cancellation. Same session-cancel UX gap opencode
  #34838 fixed at their router-transition level.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#34838 (`39dfbb5`, 2026-07-02) + prior brief
  `.github/research/2026-07-01-research.md:104`.
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: small (~2h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: #1 (~1h, retires prior #3), #3 (~2h, closes the
   AbortSignal gap), #2 (~2h, preventive - no user impact today).
2. **Defer**: cline #12011 (hub session mapping, ours is file-backed),
   cline #12023 (history export structured commands, `dataExporter.ts`
   already handles export), opencode #34864 / #34863 / #34861 / #34842
   (app/desktop UI, our TUI is Ink), opencode #34826 (Cerebras SDK, we
   use SAP AI Core), opencode #34857 (Windows session dir, already
   handled at `sessionManager.ts:232-239`), opencode #34850 (LaTeX
   inline, TUI does not render math), kilocode #11845 memory effect
   layer (different design from `src/core/memory.ts`, not a port).
3. **No demotions**: daily set (kilocode, cline, sst/opencode) all
   produced actionable signal this cycle.
